events.name: New Orleans Saints at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — As soon as the flag flew for pass interference, Younghoe Koo knew he would have a chance to win it for the Atlanta Falcons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Younghoe Koo's 58-yard field goal with 2 seconds left gives Falcons 26-24 win over Saints

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Once Caleb Williams and the Bears' offense found their rhythm, they started stringing together the sort of possessions the team and its fans envision on a regular basis.
headlines.shortLinkText: Caleb Williams leads 4 scoring drives as Bears beat Rams 24-18

events.name: Minnesota Vikings at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold and the Minnesota Vikings keep proving skeptics wrong while maintaining early control of the NFC North race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold and undefeated Vikings dominate first half and hang on to beat Packers 31-29

headlines.description: — When the Indianapolis Colts needed Joe Flacco to relieve the injured Anthony Richardson, the 17-year veteran kept it simple.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joe Flacco relieves injured Anthony Richardson and helps Colts hold off Steelers 27-24

events.name: Denver Broncos at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Bo Nix finally threw his first NFL touchdown pass in his fourth pro start — and it came at a great time for the Denver Broncos.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nix throws his first NFL touchdown pass to help Broncos slip past Rodgers and the Jets 10-9

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers will take a 3-1 start that has them in a position to chase a fourth consecutive NFC South title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield throws for 347 yards and accounts for three TDs to lead Bucs over Eagles 33-16

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow knew coming into the game that this was as close to a must-win as you can have early in the NFL season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joe Burrow throws for 2 TDs, Bengals hold on to beat Panthers 34-24 for first victory of the season

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans hadn't scored in the second half and had punted on five straight possessions Sunday when they got one last chance to avoid being upset by the Jacksonville Jaguars.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stroud's TD pass with 18 seconds left lifts Texans to 24-20 win over Jaguars

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels waited for a couple of blockers and then weaved forward for a 9-yard touchdown run, flipping the ball behind his back before doing a little dance and flashing a big...
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie QB Daniels stars again in desert return, Commanders beat Cardinals 42-14 for 3rd straight

events.name: New England Patriots at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — Even after all the success the San Francisco 49ers had the past few seasons, a two-game skid and a string of injuries early in the season can raise some doubts for any team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fred Warner's pick-6 helps the 49ers snap a 2-game skid with a 30-13 win over the Patriots

events.name: Cleveland Browns at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The Las Vegas Raiders used a strong defense as well as a balanced running game to hold off a late rally to beat the Cleveland Browns 20-16 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raiders hold off Browns rally to win 20-16 behind defense and new-found running game

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes has run through the gamut of situations in his 100 regular-season starts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce help Chiefs rally for 17-10 win over Chargers

headlines.description: — Derrick Henry was off and running from the first time he touched the ball. There was no way the Buffalo Bills were stopping the Baltimore Ravens after that.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry runs for 199 yards and Jackson has 3 TDs as Ravens rout previously unbeaten Bills 35-10
